content: TASK-073 checkpoint done: Prototype loading is now explicit and held long enough to be visible. Prototype map rendering emits archmap:prototype-render-state loading/ready events, waits two animation frames before heavy map construction, and only signals ready after fit/transform has applied. The dev playground and <archmap-viewer> loading overlays now use a minimum visible duration and stay up while the prototype map reports loading. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts, npm run build, and npm test passed. TASK-056 broader performance remains open.
